subheadline: Turns editorial material into a polished reading surface with compact hierarchy, clear affordances, and shadcn token rhythm. This timeline example includes realistic content for browser review.

items.title: Map the editorial flow
items.content: Gives content teams practical copy, useful metadata, and responsive density that works across long-form pages and compact previews.

items.title: Shape the reusable sections
items.content: Keeps stories, resources, and supporting media calm, scannable, and ready for production review.

items.title: Check spacing and hierarchy
items.content: Turns editorial material into a polished reading surface with compact hierarchy, clear affordances, and shadcn token rhythm.

items.title: Hand off a ready pattern
items.content: Packages the timeline with realistic labels, content, and actions so browser review reflects a production page.
